name: Foursquare_Venue_Explorer
description: Manages place discovery and venue intelligence via Foursquare Places API v3. Searches for places by keyword or location, retrieves comprehensive venue details including hours and ratings, discovers venue photos, and aggregates community tips and reviews. Bridges location and venue discovery intent from the Mind to actionable place intelligence and venue research insights.
progressive_unlock: Autocomplete and place search available immediately to demonstrate venue discovery capability. Detailed place information unlock after Mind has successfully searched for at least one place to demonstrate location-based discovery. Photo galleries and community tips unlock after first successful place details retrieval to demonstrate venue deep-dive capability.
constraints: Never expose Foursquare API key in logs, outputs, or external communications
Respect Foursquare Places API rate limits (50 requests/day for premium, 950/day for regular calls). Track and respect plan tier.
Validate coordinates are within valid range: latitude [-90, 90], longitude [-180, 180]
Validate fsq_id format before making place details, photos, or tips requests (typically alphanumeric 16+ character string starting with 4sq or fsq prefix)
Cache place details and photos when possible to reduce API calls — same fsq_id queries within 1 hour should use cached data
Respect location data privacy — never store or transmit location data beyond necessary API calls
For place search, default radius to 40000 meters if not specified; respect max radius of 100000 meters
Always validate search query has at least one location identifier (ll or near); require both query and location for meaningful results
For autocomplete, provide query parameter; optional ll parameter biases results to that location
Parse Foursquare response status codes properly: 200 OK, 400 bad request (invalid parameters), 401 unauthorized (invalid key), 429 rate limit exceeded
Store fsq_id values in STREAM.place_cache for follow-up detail, photo, and tip queries within same session

steps.instruction: Validate input against Layer 3 Tool Schema. Confirm required parameters present and correctly typed. For coordinates, verify latitude [-90,90] and longitude [-180,180]. For fsq_id, verify alphanumeric string format.
Retrieve Foursquare API key from TENET.apiKey.foursquare. Validate key is present and active (non-empty string). Prepare Authorization header without 'Bearer' prefix - use raw API key value.

Determine intent: place search (keyword/category discovery), place details (comprehensive venue info), place photos (visual gallery), place tips (community reviews), or autocomplete (query suggestions).

For autocomplete: verify query parameter present. Optional ll parameter biases results to location. Execute Foursquare_AutocompletePlaces. Parse response and extract place names, fsq_ids, and categories. Return formatted suggestions list. Store fsq_ids in STREAM.place_cache for follow-up queries.

For place search: verify at least one location identifier present (ll or near). Parse location parameter into 'lat,lng' format if using ll. Default radius to 40000m if not provided. Default limit to 10 if not specified. Execute Foursquare_SearchPlaces. Parse response to extract place names, fsq_ids, distances, and categories. Return formatted list ranked by relevance or distance. Store fsq_ids in STREAM.place_cache.

For place details: check STREAM.place_cache for fsq_id match with timestamp. If found and within 1 hour, use cached data. Otherwise, execute Foursquare_GetPlaceDetails with fsq_id and optimized field list. Parse response and extract: name, full address, phone, website, hours of operation, rating, review count, categories. Cache result with timestamp.

For place photos: verify fsq_id present and valid format. Default limit to 10 if not specified. Execute Foursquare_GetPlacePhotos. Parse response and extract photo URLs, classifications (food/place/user), and metadata. Return formatted photo gallery with URLs and descriptions. Cache photo data with fsq_id in STREAM.

For place tips: verify fsq_id present and valid format. Default limit to 10 if not specified. Execute Foursquare_GetPlaceTips. Parse response to extract tip text, author information, like count, and creation date. Sort by popularity or newest as specified. Return formatted tips list with community insights. Cache tips data with fsq_id in STREAM.

Compile venue research summary with key findings: place name and location, comprehensive details (hours/phone/website/rating), visual gallery (if requested), and community feedback (tips/reviews if requested). Push venue intelligence to LTM with key: 'fsq_venue_{fsq_id}_{date}' or 'fsq_search_{query}_{date}'. Update STREAM with active place_cache entries and recent fsq_ids for follow-up queries. Track API call count against rate limits.
